pipeline.summary: Aveva Drug Delivery Systems is part of a collaboration for the U.S.-based manufacturing of the JKB-122 immune restoration platform, which is advancing toward Phase 2b/3 clinical development. Callan JMB will oversee manufacturing operations for clinical trials of JKB-122, an investigational drug for Long COVID treatment, including contract manufacturing organization qualification and supply chain verification.
pipeline.stage: Phase 2b/3 clinical development, manufacturing for clinical trials
pipeline.why_it_matters: This new manufacturing program for a late-stage clinical drug indicates upcoming demand for lab supplies, reagents, consumables, and scientific equipment for production and quality control.

ai_summary: Aveva Drug Delivery Systems is collaborating on the JKB-122 immune restoration platform for Long COVID, advancing to Phase 2b/3 clinical trials. Callan JMB is managing manufacturing and supply chain verification. This significant late-stage development and manufacturing activity signals increased demand for lab supplies, reagents, and equipment for R&D, QC, and production, creating a prime sales opportunity for supporting this critical project.
